name: wavespeedai-skills
summary: Provider-agnostic CLI for the WaveSpeedAI inference platform — 700+ media models (image, video, audio, 3D) plus 290+ OpenAI-compatible LLMs through a single API key. Single-file Python with a thin shell shim, plus skill bundle for Claude Code, Codex, Hermes, OpenClaw.
